body_txt: A simple form of The Reveal used to explain why Police Are Useless , and why our otherwise normal characters don't simply ask the police to deal with the dangerous criminals. It turns out the police are the criminals . Generally speaking, this trope is intended to rationalize why the main characters don't go to the police with their problems, which tends to be the logical response by normal people to outrageous things like murder plots. This can also be established in the back story and does not need to be displayed on-screen directly. Often involves at least one Dirty Cop by necessity, may include a Rabid Cop , a Killer Cop , or even Gas Mask Mooks , and will almost certainly occur in a World of Bad Cops . This can result in a Have You Told Anyone Else? from the bad cops if someone comes to them in search of a Hope Spot . Police Brutality may also transpire. If the corruption extends to the legal system as a whole, that's Legalized Evil . Police Pigs are also likely to be paired with these portrayals of the police — positive or neutral depictions tend to use dogs as cops instead . If the bad guys are only pretending to be cops, that's Impersonating an Officer . Compare Secret Police , who are similarly bad guys but usually a step above the cops, and contrast SWATting , where the police don't intend to do anything wrong but someone tricks them into needlessly going after someone anyway. Similar to Suspiciously Idle Officers (corrupt officers are never seen doing their duties). See also Detective Mole . Unfortunately, too often Truth in Television in a lot of countries (and some would say everywhere ). This is unsurprisingly a contentious topic, so No Real Life Examples, Please! As this is often a Plot Twist , expect spoilers. noreallife
